title: viola × insessa
intro: Viola × insessa, also known as hybrid viola, is a cross between two species of violas, typically Viola sororia and Viola pedunculata, resulting in a unique and adaptable plant species. The medicinal properties of Viola × insessa lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support immune system health. Herbal preparations of Viola × insessa can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
